description: Manage creation of communication rooms with configurable presets and version upgrades that atomically migrate members and state while tombstoning the old room.

actors.name: Room Creator
actors.description: User who initiates room creation or upgrade

actors.name: Homeserver
actors.description: Server that persists events and manages room state

actors.name: Room Member
actors.description: Existing member migrated during a room upgrade

fields.name: room_id
fields.label: Globally unique identifier assigned at creation

fields.name: room_creator_id
fields.label: User identifier of the creator; receives highest power level

fields.name: room_version
fields.label: Version string determining auth rules and state resolution algorithm

fields.name: preset
fields.label: Template that sets default join rules, history visibility, and guest access

fields.name: is_public
fields.label: Whether the room appears in the public room directory

fields.name: initial_state
fields.label: Additional state events to apply immediately after creation

fields.name: creation_content
fields.label: Custom fields merged into the creation event content

fields.name: power_level_content_override
fields.label: Custom power level assignments overriding preset defaults

values.description: A version upgrade is in progress
Room superseded by a newer version; no further events accepted

transitions.description: Creator initiates a room version upgrade
Upgrade completes; new room is active
Tombstone event written to old room after upgrade succeeds

creation: Creator automatically receives power level 100 and is the sole initial member
Presets define default join rules, history visibility, and whether guests can join
Power levels may be overridden by the creator at creation time
Encryption can be enabled by default based on server policy for certain presets
Room identifiers are unique; collisions trigger a retry with a new identifier
upgrade: Only one upgrade per room may be in progress concurrently
Upgrade must copy all relevant state events to the new room before tombstoning the old room
After upgrade, local members are auto-joined and remote members are invited to the new room
Up to five retries are attempted if a state conflict occurs during upgrade

given: requester has not exceeded room creation rate limit

then.description: Room record and genesis event sequence persisted

room_created.result: Room is ready for members to join and exchange messages

given: preset or server policy requires encryption

then.description: Room created with encryption state event included

room_created_with_encryption.result: Room is created with end-to-end encryption enabled from the first message

given: creator has room admin power level
no concurrent upgrade is already in progress

then.description: New room created with state cloned from old room
Tombstone event written to old room

room_upgrade_success.result: Members are migrated to the new room; old room is archived

room_upgrade_failed.result: Upgrade aborted; original room remains active

given: creator has exceeded the room creation rate limit
rate_limited.result: Room creation rejected until rate limit window resets

errors.message: An upgrade for this room is currently in progress
Room upgrade could not be completed
You have created too many rooms recently. Please wait before creating another.
The requested room version is not supported by this server

events.name: room.created
events.description: A new room has been initialised and is ready for use

events.name: room.upgraded
events.description: Room has been successfully migrated to a new version

events.name: room.upgrade.failed
events.description: Room upgrade could not complete after all retries

related.reason: Power levels are established in the initial room state at creation
State events are the mechanism for all room configuration
Federation senders are initialised for federated rooms on creation
Room upgrade invites remote members to the new room
Encryption state event may be included at creation time
